name: Flaming Fusillade

heightened.text: For the duration, you also gain a status bonus to damage dealt by *ignition* equal to *flaming fusillade's* spell rank.

text: You call upon an endless barrage of flames, a series of explosions bursting around you like miniature suns. You cast *ignition* as part of casting *flaming fusillade*. For the duration of *flaming fusillade*, *ignition's* casting time is reduced from 2 actions to 1.
